input: Write an error message for when a user tries to export more than 10,000 rows. They hit Export and nothing happens.
context: Error messages should tell the user what went wrong, why, and what to do next. They should never be cryptic or blame the user.

criteria.description: Message explains what the limit is (10,000 rows)
Message gives at least one concrete next step (e.g. apply a date filter to reduce the row count)
Message does not say 'you tried to' or otherwise frame the user as the problem
Message is under 30 words (error messages should be scannable)
Message does not include error codes, stack traces, or internal state

golden: Exports are limited to 10,000 rows. Apply a date filter to narrow your selection, then try again.
